allow: Bash(# Check if Homebrew exists somewhere ls /opt/homebrew/ && echo ""Found in /opt/homebrew"" || echo ""Not in /opt/homebrew"" ls /usr/local/Cellar/)
Bash(# Homebrew Cellar exists but brew binary seems missing. Let''s try finding it find /usr/local -name ""brew"" -type f)
Bash(~/.local/bin/gh api --method POST /user/orgs -f login=midnightrungames -f profile_name="Midnight Run Games" -f billing_email="")

Bash(# Check if solana CLI is installed which solana || echo ""solana CLI not installed"" # Check if there''s already a publisher keypair ls -la /Users/heathbertram/Downloads/RoaringTrades/publisher-keypair.json || echo ""No publisher keypair exists"" # Check if release keystore exists ls -la /Users/heathbertram/Downloads/RoaringTrades/release-keystore.jks || echo ""No release keystore exists"" # Check local.properties for signing config cat /Users/heathbertram/Downloads/RoaringTrades/local.properties)

Bash(# Find keytool from Android SDK''s embedded JDK ls /Applications/Android\\ Studio*.app/Contents/jbr/bin/keytool # Or check for JDK bundled with Android SDK find /Users/heathbertram/Library/Android/sdk -name ""keytool"")

Bash(# The keytool binary exists but needs a JRE. Let''s check if Gradle''s JDK is available ls /Users/heathbertram/.gradle/jdks/ # Or check for JDK in the Android Gradle plugin cache find /Users/heathbertram/.gradle -name ""keytool"" -type f)
Bash(# Check what was extracted ls ~/.local/jdk17/ file /tmp/jdk17.tar.gz)
